narrative:
Precinct Urbana South (precinct in Champaign County) has 1,115 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
